message:
Running command: echo "=== $(date) ==="
ps -p 286668 -o pid,stat,pcpu,pmem,etime 2>/dev/null && echo "LR alive" || echo "LR DONE"
echo ""
WRAPPER_RUN="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"
ls -t "$WRAPPER_RUN/" | grep "^[0-9]" | head -15
echo ""
ls "$WRAPPER_RUN/final/gds/" 2>/dev/null && echo "FINAL GDS EXISTS" || echo "no final GDS yet"
echo ""
tail -5 /tmp/librelane_wrapper.log
echo ""
tail -5 /tmp/lr_status.log
